title: Ripple co-founder backs venture launched by US senator's son: Report
summary: Ripple co-founder backs venture launched by US senator's son: Report
briefing: While engaged in negotiations over ethics in a crypto market structure bill in Congress, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand said she had “no involvement” in her son’s derivatives exchange, backed by at least one industry figure.

title: IMF says tokenization could transform settlement and financial stability
summary: IMF says tokenization could transform settlement and financial stability
briefing: The global lender says blockchain-based finance could streamline markets but warns that fragmented standards and regulations may create new systemic risks.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Russia on track for digital ruble rollout on Sept. 1: Central bank governor
summary: Russia on track for digital ruble rollout on Sept. 1: Central bank governor
briefing: EU authorities already preemptively sanctioned Russia’s digital ruble in 2025 as part of measures in response to the country’s war against Ukraine.

title: Bitcoin price taps new July high above $62K on weak US jobs data
summary: Bitcoin price taps new July high above $62K on weak US jobs data
briefing: Bitcoin took daily gains to nearly 4% on the second day of "green July" as US labor-market signals supported an easing inflation policy from the Federal Reserve.

title: FBI director discloses Strategy holdings months after deadline: Report
summary: FBI director discloses Strategy holdings months after deadline: Report
briefing: Strategy is a registered US government contractor, though Kash Patel claimed that “no current conflict exists” with his $100,001 and $250,000 worth of the company’s stock that he reported late.

title: Ondo expands tokenized equities with onchain shareholder voting
summary: Ondo expands tokenized equities with onchain shareholder voting
briefing: Ondo's latest partnership adds shareholder governance to tokenized stocks as competition in blockchain-based equity offerings accelerates.

summary: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
briefing: From Ethereum’s Glamsterdam to Solana’s Alpenglow, 2026’s most important developments are protocol upgrades, not price charts.

title: OpenAI Offers US Government a $42 Billion Slice of Itself: Report
summary: OpenAI Offers US Government a $42 Billion Slice of Itself: Report
briefing: Sam Altman is pitching a 5% equity stake in OpenAI for the U.S. government—and reportedly wants every major AI company to do the same.

summary: Russia Is Ready for 'Widespread Use' of Digital Ruble by September, Says Bank Governor
briefing: Bank of Russia Governor Elvira Nabiullina said major banks and retailers are on track to begin accepting the digital ruble by September 1.

title: Treasury Department Sanctions Over 130 ISIS-Affiliated Crypto Wallets on Tron
summary: Treasury Department Sanctions Over 130 ISIS-Affiliated Crypto Wallets on Tron
briefing: More than 130 Tron wallets connected with a Central Asian ISIS affiliate were sanctioned by the U.S. government, with funds frozen by Tether.

summary: AI Researchers Got Chatbots to Share Cocaine Recipes Using This One Wild Trick
briefing: Researchers say a new jailbreak technique tricked AI models into treating attacker-written text as their own reasoning, bypassing safety guardrails and exposing a deeper security flaw.

briefing: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize now has shares trading on the New York Stock Exchange—or via Solana and Avalanche.

summary: Japanese Financial Giant SBI to Shut Down Bitcoin Mining Pool
briefing: SBI Crypto, the subsidiary of the Japanese financial giant, is the latest firm to shutter its Bitcoin mining endeavor.
